s: In 2019, Miguel Del Pozo suited up for LAA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 10.610, WHIP 1.930, SO 11, WAR -0.300.
Changed teams after the previous season (LAA -> PIT).
In 2020, Miguel Del Pozo suited up for PIT as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 17.180, WHIP 4.090, SO 2, WAR -0.200. Notable context: Joined PIT.
Changed teams after the previous season (PIT -> DET).
In 2021, Miguel Del Pozo suited up for DET as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.380, WHIP 1.880, SO 4, WAR 0.100. Notable context: Joined DET.
